name: RPlog_Return_of_a_Jedi_Part_I
title: Return of a Jedi (Part I)
summary: A battered Firespray, its hull gashed and venting coolant, limps out of hyperspace toward a populated planet, its pilot Bazil talked down to a safe landing by planetary control and a Chancellor figure offering a tractor assist. The arrival sets in motion a tangled reunion drawing together the dark adept Simon Sezirok, the eccentric Mira, the Jedi Jessalyn Valios, the scarred Morganna, and others like Lehec and McKenzie. As the damaged ship is brought in, the strands of these characters' fraught histories begin to converge, setting the stage for a reckoning among Jedi, Sith, and those caught between.
